title: crotalaria incana
intro: Crotalaria incana, also known as the annual rattlebox, is a perennial legume plant native to tropical Africa, known for its ability to fix atmospheric nitrogen and its use as a medicinal herb. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria incana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, which can be taken as a tea or used as a topical application for skin conditions.
